case_title: LYDIA TSE VS. JASMINE WANG PHOTOGRAPHY

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-22-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-22-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT JASMINE WANG PHOTOGRAPHY AKA JASMINE WANG AKA WANG, LI AKA LI, WANG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LYDIA TSE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASMINE WANG PHOTOGRAPHY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JASMINE WANG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
